g.text: Failure Mode | Detection Method | Impact | Recovery | Window
Leader Crash | Heartbeat Timeout | Liveness Loss | New Election | 150-300ms
Follower Crash | AppendEntries Fail | Quorum Reduction | Log Catch-up | 100-200ms
Network Partition | Vote Timeout | Partial Unavailable | Term Bump | Variable
Message Loss | Sequence Gap | Minimal Latency | Retransmission | < 50ms
Total Analyzed: 7 failure scenarios | Status: Quorum Verified

div.p: Analysis of distributed consensus resilience, timing constraints, and recovery procedures.
